scripts.test: npm run test:coverage && npm run test:e2e
scripts.test:unit: npm run test:api:contract && npm run test:api:unit && npm run test:i18n
scripts.test:coverage: npm run test:api:contract && node --test --experimental-test-coverage --test-coverage-include=tools/api/lib/api-contract.js --test-coverage-include=tools/api/validate-api.js --test-coverage-include=tests/i18n.test.js --test-coverage-lines=80 --test-coverage-branches=80 --test-coverage-functions=80 tools/api/tests/*.test.js tests/i18n.test.js
scripts.test:api: npm run test:api:contract && npm run test:api:unit && npm run test:api:e2e
scripts.test:api:pwa: npm run test:api:contract && npm run test:api:unit && playwright test --project=static-api --project=pwa
